stemHtml:
An aircraft with one nose landing gear and two main landing gears is weighed on jacks. Determine the aircraft BEM and CG position, using the following readouts:

Nose landing gear, located at 24 inches forward of datum reading: 2444 kg 
Each main landing gear, located at 795 inches aft of datum reading: 13 738 kg

options.a: 29 920 kg and 728.1 inches forward of datum.
options.b: 33 924 kg and 710 inches aft of datum.
options.c: 29 920 kg and 728.1 inches aft of datum.
options.d: 33 924 kg and 583.7 inches aft of datum.
